Name: ChaosMatchingRankControlParam
Description: Global parameters that change according to the Deep Night depth

Fields.Name: Cursed Uncommon Rate
Fields.Description: Probability that uncommon weapons will have 3 passives.

Fields.Name: Cursed Rate Rare
Fields.Description: Probability that rare weapons will have 3 passives.

Fields.Name: Map Challenge Weight - Missing Map
Fields.Description: The weighted likelihood that the map challenge will be the map not being visible.

Fields.Name: Map Challenge Weight - Missing Nightlord
Fields.Description: The weighted likelihood that the map challenge will be the nightlord not being visible.

Fields.Name: Map Challenge Weight - None
Fields.Description: The weighted likelihood that there won't be a map challenge.

Fields.Name: Catacylsm Weight - 0
Fields.Description: The weighted likelihood that there will be no catacylsm locations.

Fields.Name: Catacylsm Weight - 1
Fields.Description: The weighted likelihood that there will be one catacylsm location.

Fields.Name: Catacylsm Weight - 2
Fields.Description: The weighted likelihood that there will be two catacylsm locations.
